prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "2. Properties" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 3. Legal Proceedings".
Find where Item 2 ends: right before the "Item 3" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 2 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
We own office facilities in Bentonville, Arkansas, that serve as our principal office and own and lease office facilities throughout the U.S. and
internationally for operations as well as for field and market management. The land on which our stores are located is either owned or leased by the
Company. Owned retail units on leased land are reflected as leased locations in the table above. We use independent contractors to construct our
buildings. All store leases provide for annual rentals, some of which escalate during the original lease or provide for additional rent based on sales
volume. Substantially all of the Company's store and club leases have renewal options, some of which include rent escalation clauses. For further
